sizing_rule.note: Multi-system portfolio allocation using geometric optimal f with equalized data across all systems. Each component levered to meet required expectancy E=0.2457. Position sizes derived from solving portfolio matrix equations (7.06a-7.06d). Geometric mean calculated as HPR₁ × HPR₂ × ... × HPRₙ. Implementation requires custom matrix solver—cannot reduce to single base_risk_pct parameter.

source_rule_text: When combining multiple market systems in a portfolio, equalize all market systems' data and optimal f values before calculating position sizes, then use the geometric optimal portfolio allocation where each component is levered to meet the required expectancy E.
